features: Fixes v4.0.7 boot freeze on Preparing app
Removes self-recursive scheduleDispatchRoutePrep override caused by function hoisting
Removes self-recursive getPropertyCoords fallback caused by function hoisting
Preserves Agency Live GPS route visibility for agency-owned guards and accepted marketplace jobs
Adds boot failsafe so startup timeout returns to login instead of freezing
Added Platform Admin Command Center dashboard as the primary marketplace oversight page
Added global map-style view for online guards, guards on assigned jobs, open jobs, accepted jobs, assigned routes, and client properties
Added company-level activity panel showing active approved agencies, job counts, online guards, and assigned jobs
Added Job Ownership table showing accepted agency and assigned guard per marketplace job
Kept platform role as oversight only; agencies still accept jobs and assign their own guards
